hero.label: Premium Technology Partner
hero.title: We Build Digital
hero.subtitle: Web, mobile, AI, and digital growth solutions — crafted with precision, delivered with excellence. We turn ambitious ideas into scalable, modern products.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: Built on Passion, Driven by Innovation
about.description: Adoztech is a premium technology agency and creative digital studio founded in 2022 by Adem Aydemir and Özgür Palabıyık. We deliver scalable, modern and high-quality products across web, mobile, AI and digital growth.
about.missionText: To empower businesses of every size with cutting-edge technology solutions that drive real growth and meaningful digital transformation.
about.visionText: To become the most trusted technology partner for ambitious brands worldwide, setting new standards in digital excellence.
about.value1Desc: We stay ahead of technology trends to deliver future-proof solutions.
about.value2Desc: Every pixel, every line of code, every interaction — crafted to perfection.
about.value3Desc: Your success is our success. We build partnerships, not just products.
about.value4Desc: Clear communication, honest timelines, and no surprises along the way.
about.founder1Bio: Visionary technologist with deep expertise in web architectures, mobile platforms, and AI-driven solutions. Adem leads strategy and innovation at Adoztech.
about.founder2Bio: Full-stack engineer and systems architect with a passion for building scalable, high-performance applications. Özgür drives the technical vision and engineering excellence.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Services Built for Growth
services.description: End-to-end digital solutions designed to elevate your brand and accelerate your business.
services.s1Desc: High-performance, visually stunning websites that convert visitors into customers. From corporate sites to complex web applications, we build digital experiences that drive results.
services.s2Desc: Native and cross-platform mobile applications that users love. We craft intuitive, fast, and reliable apps for iOS and Android that keep your audience engaged.
services.s3Desc: Harness the power of artificial intelligence to automate processes, gain insights, and create intelligent products. From chatbots to predictive analytics, we make AI work for you.
services.s4Desc: Strategic social media presence that builds your brand and grows your audience. We create compelling content, manage communities, and drive measurable engagement.
services.s5Desc: User-centered design that delights and converts. We create intuitive interfaces and seamless experiences through research-driven design thinking.
services.s6Desc: Dominate search results with data-driven SEO strategies. We optimize your digital presence to attract organic traffic and improve your visibility.
services.s7Desc: Keep your digital products running smoothly with proactive maintenance, security updates, and dedicated technical support.
services.s8Desc: Create a memorable brand that stands out. From logo design to complete brand systems, we craft identities that resonate with your audience.

projects.label: Our Work
projects.title: Projects That Speak for Themselves
projects.description: A selection of our finest work, crafted with passion and precision for clients who demand excellence.
projects.p1Desc: A comprehensive blood sugar tracking and diabetes management mobile app, helping users maintain health with intelligent insights.
projects.p2Desc: Advanced financial analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization and AI-powered market predictions.
projects.p3Desc: Healthcare platform connecting patients with doctors through telemedicine, integrated scheduling, and health records.
projects.p4Desc: AI-powered sustainability analytics platform tracking carbon footprint and environmental impact for enterprises.
projects.p5Desc: Premium e-commerce platform for handcrafted products with AR product preview and personalized shopping experience.
projects.p6Desc: Enterprise cloud management solution with automated deployment, monitoring, and cost optimization features.
projects.p7Desc: A premium portfolio website bringing together visual storytelling and AI art with technology.

metinduzdag.label: Personal Portfolio
metinduzdag.title: Metin Düzdağ
metinduzdag.subtitle: Visual Storytelling & AI Art
metinduzdag.heroDesc: A modern portfolio experience that pushes the boundaries of AI art and blends cultural heritage with technology. At Adoztech, we built a high-performance platform reflecting the artist's digital vision.
metinduzdag.whatDesc: Developed for Metin Düzdağ, this platform is a modern web application designed to showcase the artist's captivating AI-generated works, announce exhibitions, and manage collaborations. It presents the artist's prestigious projects like 'Anıtkabir' and 'Galata Tower' with the digital aesthetics they deserve.
metinduzdag.f1Desc: An optimized gallery system where high-resolution AI works are showcased without performance loss.
metinduzdag.f2Desc: Instant updates for exhibition, portfolio, and collaboration content with Payload CMS integration.
metinduzdag.f3Desc: Lightning-fast page transitions and top-tier SEO compatibility provided by Next.js technology.
metinduzdag.f4Desc: Fluid and modern animations created with Framer Motion, matching the spirit of the art.
metinduzdag.whyDesc: The digital presence of a visionary artist like Metin Düzdağ had to be as impressive as his works. We combined our technical expertise with an artistic perspective to ensure a perfect harmony of aesthetics and technology.

glukomate.label: Our Product
glukomate.title: GlukoMate
glukomate.subtitle: Blood Sugar & Diabetes Management
glukomate.heroDesc: Take control of your health with intelligent blood sugar tracking. GlukoMate makes diabetes management simple, insightful, and stress-free.
glukomate.whatDesc: GlukoMate is a comprehensive blood sugar tracking and diabetes management application designed to help users monitor their glucose levels, track trends, and gain meaningful insights into their health journey. Built with simplicity and reliability at its core.
whoItems: People living with Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes
Individuals with prediabetes monitoring their glucose
Anyone interested in monitoring blood sugar levels
Caregivers managing health for family members
glukomate.f1Desc: Log blood sugar readings quickly with intuitive input and smart suggestions.
glukomate.f2Desc: Visualize glucose patterns with interactive charts spanning days, weeks, and months.
glukomate.f3Desc: AI-powered insights help you understand factors affecting your blood sugar levels.
glukomate.f4Desc: Customizable reminders ensure you never miss a reading or medication.
glukomate.f5Desc: Share comprehensive reports with your healthcare provider in PDF format.
glukomate.f6Desc: Your health data stays on your device. No ads, no tracking, no compromises.
glukomate.whyDesc: Living with diabetes shouldn't mean living with complexity. We built GlukoMate because we believe everyone deserves simple, powerful tools to manage their health with confidence. Born from real conversations with patients and healthcare professionals, every feature is designed to reduce friction and increase peace of mind.
trustItems: Regular updates based on user feedback
